name: Agent Definition Validation
description: Verify all agent markdown files have valid frontmatter and descriptions for semantic routing

test_cases.name: Agent markdown files exist in all plugins

assertions.description: Each plugin should have an agents/ directory
At least one agent file should exist

test_cases.name: All agents have valid YAML frontmatter

assertions.description: Agent files must have YAML frontmatter
Agent frontmatter must include 'description' for semantic routing

test_cases.name: Agent descriptions are clear and specific

assertions.description: Descriptions should be detailed enough for semantic matching
Descriptions should be specific, not generic

test_cases.name: No duplicate agent names across all plugins

assertions.description: Agent names must be unique across all PopKit plugins

test_cases.name: Agent tier directories follow standard structure

assertions.description: Agent tier directories must use standard naming

notes: Agent routing is semantic based on descriptions, not keyword configs
Each plugin manages its own agents independently
Agent names must be unique across all plugins to avoid conflicts
Tier structure is organizational, actual routing is semantic
